world.title: 'It Takes Two' rapper Rob Base, who helped bring hip-hop mainstream, dies at 59
world.description: Rapper Rob Base has died after a battle with cancer. He was 59. His team shared the news of his death on his Instagram page. Base was one half of the Harlem hip-hop duo Rob Base & DJ E-Z Rock.
